refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: [mask, foreground] = imgrabcut(image, rect) [mask, foreground] = imgrabcut(image, rect, iterations)

listitem.para: Initial foreground rectangle [x y width height] in upper-left image coordinates.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imgrabcut runs GrabCut with an initial [x y width height] rectangle in upper-left image coordinates. mask contains 0 or 1 and foreground is black outside the detected foreground.

refsection.title: Examples
